mxlibrary: [ { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 271, "h": 200, "title": "路由器", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 285, "h": 200, "title": "1U服务器", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 229, "h": 200, "title": "1U服务器堆", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 159, "h": 200, "title": "电脑端", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 128, "h": 200, "title": "防火墙", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 149, "h": 200, "title": "服务器", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 255, "h": 200, "title": "核心交换机", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 255, "h": 200, "title": "汇聚交换机", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 185, "h": 200, "title": "机柜", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 255, "h": 200, "title": "交换机", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 114, "h": 200, "title": "平板端", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 96, "h": 200, "title": "手机端", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 182, "h": 200, "title": "蓄电池组", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 258, "h": 200, "title": "业务设备", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 142, "h": 200, "title": "ATM交换机", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 227, "h": 200, "title": "ATM路由器", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 201, "h": 200, "title": "IDC资源", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 180, "h": 132, "title": "internet-cloud", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 173, "h": 147, "title": "无线AP", "aspect": "fixed" }, { "data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 179, "h": 100, "title": "POE交换机", "aspect": "fixed" } ]
